rows.label: qev085804_MSG0001
rows.name:
Wow, dealing with that many native
creatures... You guys are truly amazing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0002
rows.name:
Now then, we shall begin
installing the Data Probe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0003
rows.name:
We will stand guard around the
perimeter. Focus entirely on your work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0004
rows.name: The work seems to be progressing smoothly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0005
rows.name:
Elma-san, we're all set over here. It'll
be complete in just a few minutes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0006
rows.name:
Waaah! S-Saiden-san, let's
hurry and run away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0007
rows.name:
Go on your own if you wish. I
cannot move until I finish this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0008
rows.name: Y-You're going to die![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0009
rows.name:
We are just [System:Ruby rt=Blue Bloods ]B.B.s[/System:Ruby] anyway. Dying once for
the sake of BLADE is nothing to fret over.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0011
rows.name: You two...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0012
rows.name:
It'll be finished faster with two people rather than
one, and three people rather than two, won't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0013
rows.name: My apologies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0014
rows.name: Elma-san![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0015
rows.name:
We must not let them lay a
single finger on those three.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_JNK0010
rows.name: Confidence

rows.label: qev085804_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod to show you will protect them no matter what.

rows.label: qev085804_JNK0020
rows.name: Aggression

rows.label: qev085804_SEL0021
rows.name: Be enthusiastic about taking them down swiftly.

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0016
rows.name: So reliable mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0017
rows.name: I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0018
rows.name: Don't get carried away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0018_2
rows.name:
It's fine to be enthusiastic, but
our goal is to secure their safety.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085804_MSG0019
rows.name: Understood?[ST:wait ]
